payload.note: The organization 'Global Marine Services LLC' being screened has been flagged for investigation due to discrepancies with an SDN entry named 'Global Marine Service Co.' Specifically, there are conflicts in the incorporation date (2011-03 vs 2019-04), country of operation (US vs IR), and name variations. Although entity type support exists, critical information such as a precise date of birth and strong identifier corroboration is lacking, necessitating further analyst review to resolve these contradictions before reaching a definitive decision.
evidence_summary: Incorporation date mismatch: Global Marine Service Co (2011-01-03) vs. screened party (2019-04-18)
Entity named 'Global Marine' identified in SDN list, supporting organization type
Contradiction in country with SDN entry listed as 'IR' but screened party US based
Identifier conflict: Screened entity name 'Global Marine Services LLC' vs. SDN entry 'Global Marine Service Co'
Sparse corroboration noted for date of birth, geography, and strong identifier support missing
missing_information_summary: Missing country alignment between the screened party (US) and SDN entry (IR)
Lack of precise date of birth for both entities
No additional context or data to resolve contradictions
payload.next_step_rationale: Investigate the hard contradictions in country, date of incorporation, and identifiers given sparse corroboration.
